title: Canonical fact-check fixture
subtitle: Used by Playwright tests
passage: The bridge opened in 2018 and ridership doubled.

sources.title: Example city release
sources.quote: Public records list the opening ceremony in September 2018.

claims.claim: Ridership doubled in the first year.
claims.check: Transit data shows 32% growth, not a doubling.
claims.correction: ~doubled~ *grew about 32%* in the first year -- transit data shows a 32% rise [Transit data](https://example.com/transit)

sources.title: Example transit data
sources.quote: Ridership increased 32% compared to the prior year.
